iot.jobtemplate.jobexecutionsrolloutconf: Allows you to create a staged rollout of a job.

iot.jobtemplate.jobexecutionsrolloutconf.Description: The rate of increase for a job rollout. This parameter allows you to define an exponential rate for a job rollout.
The maximum number of things that will be notified of a pending job, per minute. This parameter allows you to create a staged rollout.
